query:
UPDATE leases
            SET
                leased = $4, expires_at = $5, probation = $6, client_id = $7
            WHERE ip in
               (
                    SELECT ip
                    FROM leases
                    WHERE
                        ((expires_at > $1) AND (client_id = $2) AND (ip = $3))
                    ORDER BY ip LIMIT 1
                )
            RETURNING ip
